source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d: 2026-07-16..07-22, landingPage + sessionManualAdContent split) + Shopify live pull (net_sales EUR + orders, last 90d, by billing_country). Significance/verdict block carried from last Monday (2026-07-13); recomputed Mondays only.
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Refreshed daily by Polly (data); pause/promote verdicts on Mondays. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, built_not_yet_live) preserved for future UI surfaces.
polly_note: DATA-ONLY REFRESH (Thursday 2026-07-23). No pause/promote verdicts today - decision review: Mondays. EN A/B: control A still ahead - by page A 0.95% (17 txn / 1783 sess) vs B 0.78% (14 txn / 1798 sess); by ad-content lp_a 0.90% (16 txn / 1776 sess) vs lp_b 0.75% (14 txn / 1877 sess). Gap consistent with yesterday, still under threshold - no verdict. WATCH: EN bounce roughly doubled wk/wk (A 11.7%->23.0%, B 12.5%->21.2%) - flagging as an observation, not a verdict; will confirm whether it's a real shift or last week's unusually-low read normalizing. LOCALIZED RECOVERY ACCELERATING (Bengt's 07-21 routing fix): lying-pirates-it 36->155 sess wk/wk, lying-pirates-de 15->40; old big-box-*-<lang> URLs decaying (it 16, de 5). Still 0 LP-level txn (lossy LP->checkout attribution) but session recovery is clear and strong. Shopify 90d stable & growing: US/UK/IT top 3 unchanged (IT 150 orders / EUR10,686, 3rd-largest market).

experiments.name: Big Box LP - Headline & Hero (EN)
experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).

significance.window: 2026-06-01..07-12 (cumulative) - carried from last Monday verdict, recomputed Mondays

experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Thu). By page this week A 0.95% (17 txn / 1783 sess) vs B 0.78% (14 txn / 1798 sess); by ad-content lp_a 0.90% (16 txn / 1776 sess) vs lp_b 0.75% (14 txn / 1877 sess). Note: EN bounce ~doubled wk/wk (A 23.0%, B 21.2%) - watching. Standing recommendation holds: ship shared improvements to A & B and launch V3 as a genuinely different challenger.

experiments.name: Localized LP variants (IT / DE / FR / ES)
experiments.hypothesis: Translated LPs convert non-EN paid traffic at rates comparable to EN, once ad clicks actually land on a live localized page.

retired_urls_residual_7d.note: Old rotator A/B targets, retired 07-21 when the worker was repointed. Small tails are residual/cached traffic, decaying as expected.

real_sales_90d.note: Refreshed 2026-07-23 via live Shopify pull (orders by billing_country, revenue = net_sales EUR, last 90d). Confirms localized markets keep buying in real volume even while GA LP-level conv still reads ~0 (lossy LP->checkout attribution; recovery window still only partial).

experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Thu), no verdict. Recovery from the 07-21 routing fix is ACCELERATING: lying-pirates-it 36->155 sess wk/wk, lying-pirates-de 15->40; retired big-box-*-<lang> URLs decaying (it 16, de 5). Still 0 LP-level txn (attribution loss LP->checkout) but the session rebound is unambiguous. Real demand always intact: IT 3rd-largest market (150 orders / EUR10,686 in 90d). MONITOR: next Monday will be the first full 7d window entirely post-fix - that's when a conv verdict becomes meaningful.
